summary: Successfully tested the marketplace page 'How It Works' section relocation. All requirements met: the section was moved from its separate location to the right side of the hero section as a visual timeline panel, matching the Creator Studio layout pattern.
passed_tests: How It Works visual panel correctly positioned on right side
All 4 steps (Browse, Complete Intake, Connect, Go Live) display correctly
Visual timeline elements (circles, lines, connectors) working properly
Panel CTA links to catalogue section and is functional
Layout matches Creator Studio pattern with right-side visual panel
Responsive design works on tablet (768px) and mobile (390px)
All timeline steps remain visible on smaller screens
CTAs remain clickable and functional on mobile devices
